title: [Dubh Brugh, Cavern]
description: The dark cavern is formed from black lava, frozen in porous splendor.  The ceiling is low enough that crawling or stooping are the only options.  Nasty snarls in the distance suggest that stooping is better than crawling at this point.

wayto.7905:

waitrt?
fput 'stand' until standing?
